case_title: KELLY MOORE PAINT COMPANY INC. VS WAITE BRUCE A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,001.76 FILED BY KELLY MOORE PAINT COMPANY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WAITE BRUCE A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WAITE BRUCE A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLY MOORE PAINT COMPANY INC.
